profile_route.source: fresh RCH criterion linalg profile after frankenjax-4doiz closeout and current no-gaps routing

top_rows.decision: Top row, but direct GEMM remains blocked by the closed exact-order bitwise contract; recursive or communication-avoiding GEMM needs explicit FP-tolerance contract artifacts first.
Same exact-order GEMM contract family as the 2048 row.
Top shippable non-GEMM factorization row under the existing large-blocked tolerance contract.

profile_route.alien_primitive: Safe-Rust portable-SIMD lane accumulation for the inner c dimension of the blocked Cholesky lower Schur dot. Unlike the rejected q-lane SYRK microkernel, this lever uses the already tolerance-gated large-blocked path to admit a deterministic FP grouping change.

lever.description: Replace the scalar c loop inside cholesky_schur_update_lower_rows with an 8-lane std::simd dot helper plus scalar tail.

same_worker_gate.baseline_source: restored scalar Schur dot with original blocked Cholesky digest
same_worker_gate.candidate_source: final SIMD Schur dot with updated blocked Cholesky digest

isomorphism: Small matrices still use cholesky_real_scalar and preserve the real-vs-complex bit-identity test.
The diagonal block factorization order is unchanged.
Panel solve row order and per-row arithmetic order are unchanged.
The trailing update still visits lower-triangle entries in the same p then q order and leaves strict upper-triangle entries untouched until final zero materialization.
For each lower Schur entry, the c contributions are now grouped by 8 SIMD lanes; this intentionally changes large blocked-path FP association.
The large blocked Cholesky path was already verified by scalar parity within tolerance plus reconstruction, not by bit identity.
dtype, shape, non-square rejection, non-positive-definite NaN behavior, signed-zero surface, and RNG absence are unchanged.

validation.details: rustfmt would reflow existing eig/triangular-solve/test regions outside the Cholesky diff; file was not broad-formatted to avoid unrelated churn.
17 critical, 1143 warnings, 201 info; no unsafe blocks; UBS fmt, clippy, cargo check, and test-build sections are clean.

decision: Keep. Same-worker median speedup is 1.132696x, conservative speedup is 1.086353x, intervals are non-overlapping, and Score 6.0 >= 2.0.
